label: FAO Vegetable Oil Price Index (nominal)
description: FAO international food commodity index, 2014-2016=100; not a global grocery-price index.
definition: FAO international food commodity index, 2014-2016=100; not a global grocery-price index.
comparisonLimitations: Country baskets, weights, index bases, seasonal treatment, and housing institutions differ. Compare growth rates and within-country percentiles before levels.
interpretation: International food commodity pressure; this is not a global grocery-price index.
source: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
revisionStatus: FAO may revise the full history. Recent meat-index observations combine projected and observed prices and may be revised materially.

calculation.formula: FAO international food commodity index, 2014-2016=100; not a global grocery-price index.
